label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out who Claire is dancing with at the end of the dance after all those partner switches. Let me start by listing out the initial pairings first. The problem says at the start of the song: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Izzi - Claire is with Sam - Dave is with Patrick - Eve is with Karl So the initial pairs are: Alice - Lola Bob - Izzi Claire - Sam Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Now, there are several partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one. First switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. So, Claire was with Sam, and Bob was with Izzi. After switching, Claire will take Bob's partner, Izzi, and Bob will take Claire's partner, Sam. So now the pairs become: Alice - Lola Bob - Sam Claire - Izzi Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. Claire is currently with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. After switching, Claire takes Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice takes Claire's partner (Izzi). So now: Alice - Izzi Bob - Sam Claire - Lola Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Third switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is with Sam, Claire is with Lola. After switching, Bob takes Claire's partner (Lola), and Claire takes Bob's partner (Sam). So now: Alice - Izzi Bob - Lola Claire - Sam Dave - Patrick Eve - Karl Fourth switch: Eve and Bob switch partners. Eve is with Karl, Bob is with Lola. After switching, Eve takes Bob's partner (Lola), and Bob takes Eve's partner (Karl). Now: Alice - Izzi Bob - Karl Claire - Sam Dave - Patrick Eve - Lola Fifth switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave is with Patrick, Claire is with Sam. After switching, Dave takes Claire's partner (Sam), and Claire takes Dave's partner (Patrick). Final pairs: Alice - Izzi Bob -
